name: codex-workflow
description: AI Codex workflow plugin: SessionStart Codex orientation injection, PreToolUse markdown allowlist + archetype naming enforcement, init skills (CLAUDE.md tree, archetype-driven Obsidian vault, .agent/rules starter set), mining skills (canonical style notes, refactor catalog entries, frontmatter backfill + Obsidian Bases dashboards), a read-only live vault-query skill, a Canvas relationship-map generator, a Defuddle-based research-ingest skill, and a vault-lint skill that audits/fixes drift. Four research-backed vault archetypes (software-project, research, personal-pkm, technical-docs).
